textByHash.060d63775105acbd6a00a4137366e913cd3a5057: a limited number of charges) without having to carry a pack full of them.
textByHash.0aef4fa890730350a7c906f91428bebb9c07ab33: Possibly. Either way, it seems that they almost exclusively collect things that people want, except their younglings who I infer haven't learnt the best things to collect yet.
textByHash.0fee92501d9c0ec868923eb9c691ac46bf7b1b7a: The same way you did, I suspect. Through a portal in a wheat field. I followed one back.
textByHash.12f70466afb929f526bd2bd9a1988a9493a7ffc7: I don't think these creatures have a name for it. As you can see there isn't a lot else here other than wheat.
textByHash.13692016ff8c9ee953973834e2b5922e705e2af1: I have already given you some equipment.
textByHash.16f74e5a77958352d8ff4022113c608cc752ef01: I'm an investigator. I'm watching the implings.
textByHash.182af97cc18e6fc3ad07bee072faf828b5fe99be: The fairies call it Puro-Puro. It seems to be the home plane of the implings.
textByHash.2620ce43cdca7371074571f19d62b45c609d958f: I have some impling deterrent which I may trade if you prove that you can catch implings well.
textByHash.2b61d0ee73fd69a3373cd4a6f3ab4c5e89c85dc3: I'm not at liberty to discuss that. Investigator-client confidentiality don't you know.
textByHash.2e28de174f482c10ebb52139926ccf937c1d6f05: exchange I will be able to provide you with some equipment that may help you hunt butterflies more effectively.
textByHash.2f01c19ac486bfe3164509daa15ec90620d6e005: Yes! I have some spare equipment for you.
textByHash.3d5e0e685e360cc7d600e8fe05baa2bc933d0297: There you go. You have everything you need now.
textByHash.3eb981e4d28215f3676dbcbaf8769e6ea7c12016: I have tried a few experiments with the help of a friend back home, and it turns out that a combination of anchovy oil and flowers - marigolds, rosemary or nasturtiums - will work.
textByHash.41591c7e7e89baeaa8d6afcdd1b30d20fad67299: I could lend you a cloth to wipe it off. That should let you become strong while pushing through the wheat.
textByHash.42181e8293ca2d7ccb64df9bef7cd59c3de6a8ab: Here you go. If you need some more I'll have 10 new jars ready for purchase tomorrow.
textByHash.438ec16fd20e9e9a9e5af42448c80a2edcc577d7: If you are ready to start hunting implings, then enter the main part of the maze.
textByHash.444f11830e156fb359bea02e7c2f2e2fe7f091c9: Well I may be able to let you have a few - if it means you will start hunting these implings - although I do not have an infinite supply.
textByHash.450777d3e4350b37e503f3e2460cf1fb68acda0f: That's a very interesting question. My best guess is that they are relatives to imps, which is why there are imps here as well.
textByHash.4a9eb64e93e9a580d1eb1319cabf7b331eb438d5: Firstly, I have some imp deterrent. If you bring me three baby implings, two young implings and one gourmet impling already jarred, I will give you a vial. Imps don't like the smell, so they will be less likely to
textByHash.4b76d506a4557a1659a5e8fcb3c74660285f8020: Well, I believe there is a chemist in Rimmington that has a small still that you could use.
textByHash.5920af926a915fd84b562c8075b56774cdd7940f: I will sell these jars for 2,000 coins each. How many would you like to purchase?
textByHash.600a5ad2e4ddf071fb5ce3ecac3ce14b50f3fe0e: I have been given permission by my clients to give three pieces of equipment to able hunters.
textByHash.689c125111b2324e3c9ab7c8e777ef12209b4d01: They will then set them free, dropping your jar on the floor. So, if you're quick, you may be able to catch it again.
textByHash.698fe47170ca1b5959ec89e82b5a3414fbb82a83: I suppose I could keep hold of a net and a few empty jars for you. Just give me what you want me to hold.
textByHash.6fd2bbd1622be1bb023cd977ef0629421adbb032: Imps and implings appear to be related, and the imps here are quite protective of their smaller relations. If you allow them to get too close then they will attempt to steal jarred implings from your pack, if you have them.
textByHash.75cc330df78b42c4e024cbd917d2431fa8abfc10: Once you have caught one, you may break the jar open and obtain the object the impling is carrying. Alternatively, you may exchange certain combinations of jars with me. I will return the jars to my clients. In
textByHash.75ea74b3fd6ff3d34d72861d1f3c6cb7e61e4f68: You don't seem to have brought enough coins, please come back with coins if you'd like to buy the jars.
textByHash.7d04774417a832475c9026007b5766fb8f98d39f: The wheat here can be hard to push through and pushing through it definitely makes you stronger. I found it easier to push through it for about half an hour just after coming through a temporary crop circle.
textByHash.86a50abdba5b37f5ba4b05f58314a32e53608557: I could give you oil to rub on you to reduce friction. Still as hard to push but you don't get stronger.
textByHash.885ff1986afc33600257d1db4f6eb3aa453dbadd: Secondly, I have magical butterfly nets. If you bring me three gourmet implings, two earth implings and one essence impling I will give you a new net. It will help you catch both implings and butterflies.
textByHash.8a4c33566ff79ec1a819f78a4e52a87ff602d5c3: with a thin layer of a substance noxious to them they become incapable of escape.
textByHash.96958baa0538882e29cac5c0f6c5cb4f4b2f038e: It is my observation that they collect things that other creatures want, rather than they want them themselves. It seems to provide them with sustenance.
textByHash.9a4d3b3eee503d2328a502460fd344c87b6d1666: Here you go. You can come back if you need more and tomorrow I will have another 10 jars ready for purchase.
textByHash.9b3c889420cd5027e3534e24b1e462bb8225f780: My client has asked me to find out where certain missing items have been going.
textByHash.9d03979e6a810e173746bb30595328d6e5cf1aed: You cannot use an ordinary butterfly jar as a container as the implings will escape from them with ease. However, I have done some investigation and have come up with a solution - if a butterfly jar is coated
textByHash.9f38e10c713cf535094029bff9afc5f94a0f9977: Ah, good day, it's you again. What can I do for you?
textByHash.9fa68409b6e3ab7acd87fd3da56a82b4a6795d04: Indeed you may. In fact I encourage it. You will, however, require some equipment.
textByHash.a5784056b2960019a85c4d8d187cf9bfc6c9d8f3: I usually prefer trading these jars for implings, but if you desperately need them I'm willing to sell you up to 10 jars per day.
textByHash.a60e3ce2f64e2332dc085cc1397182ff7a3b3ef2: Ah, I notice you don't own an impling collector's scroll.
textByHash.b17d2ff21f2272fb7bb9926edccb0232b31d134c: So you would like to purchase jar, costing you a total of coins. Is that correct?
textByHash.b261516f48ee302ba40a6084cb05b21225a5bdcb: So you would like to purchase jars, costing you a total of coins. Is that correct?
textByHash.b30aadf91db41e0a99f69da6c3d8377f8f581f28: I should warn you, though, if the impling is strong enough to collect dragon equipment, then you will have to be very skilled at hunting implings in order to catch them.
textByHash.b79c4df1549aea1b990445c55641915e5511604c: Have you indeed? Well, that may well be true, though bear in mind that implings are quite small so they are unlikely to be lugging a sizeable shield around with them. However, since it seems that dragon items are
textByHash.bfb6cda4265d4dae92d1cce4381d4912305a477b: I'd grind up some cooked anchovies and pass them through a sieve.
textByHash.c5546e455136de393170beb13b5cd6489378bde8: Lastly, I have magical jar generators. If you bring me three essence implings, two eclectic implings and one nature impling I will give you a jar generator. This object will create either butterfly or impling jars (up to
textByHash.d28d28bde1867050aeb05bd5d151773ddb0d002f: Just push through the wheat that surrounds the centre of the maze and get catching!
textByHash.d678e411b269d1685dab465eda15b4a9c5daac10: You will also require some experience as a Hunter since these creatures are elusive. The more immature implings require less experience, but some of the rarer implings are extraordinarily hard to find and catch.
textByHash.db8c12bda57595beace2dbe58a69e6debefdb879: You've already purchased 10 jars today, that's enough. Please come back tomorrow if you'd like to buy more.
textByHash.e1cbfbfda5c9f86763bd3ad70ec7a66cd457cf46: I call it the Farmer's Affinity.
textByHash.e3ce158e8f7cfd1cecc8e7cf83e8cd79bccce1b1: That's why I'm the investigator and you're the adventurer.
textByHash.e3ce51f91f76ad88800eca319205b7a87b4c8b89: That's too many, I can let you purchase a maximum of jars for a total of coins today.
textByHash.ea1fd96e908e3f64d140fc3a576419e20fc43b15: Implings do appear to like collecting objects and, as my clients have noted, have no concept of ownership. However, I do not sense any malicious intent.
textByHash.f03415cf84b8bd02a68d6b010521fa84029fb55f: Firstly you will need a butterfly net in which to catch them and at least one special impling jar to store an impling.
textByHash.f1f13e58e71a05d643b96058213df78112249f7b: My time is valuable, please give me a serious offer next time.
textByHash.f8ee86e119257caa93842c20bd89f4aff03cdb59: very desirable to humans then it certainly is possible that the most expert implings may try to obtain such equipment.
textByHash.fa99186f8b3a1d155da03c6def86463fb71702c6: Also, beware. Those imps walking around the maze do not like the fact that their kindred spirits are being captured and will attempt to steal any full jars you have on you, setting the implings free.
